# Alfred Concierge

> Alfred is the world's leading luxury concierge app. We connect members with the best restaurants, VIP nightlife, private jets, exotic car rentals, yacht charters, and wellness experiences across Miami, Paris, Dubai, London and beyond.

## About

Alfred Concierge is a luxury lifestyle app that provides a real human concierge available 24/7 via WhatsApp. Members gain access to impossible restaurant reservations, VIP nightlife tables, private jet charters, exotic car rentals, yacht charters, and exclusive event hospitality.

Founded in 2024, Alfred operates in Miami, Paris, Dubai, and London. Rated 4.9 stars by over 2,400 members.

## Services

### Restaurant Reservations
Book the best restaurants in Miami and Paris. Michelin-starred dining, impossible reservations, private dining rooms, waterfront tables. Over 200 curated venues.

### VIP Nightlife
VIP tables and bottle service at the hottest nightclubs. LIV Miami, E11even, Story, Club Space, Hyde Beach, Raspoutine Paris, Castel, L'Arc, CoCo Club.

### Exotic Car Rental
Ferrari, Lamborghini, Rolls Royce, McLaren, Porsche and luxury supercar rentals in Miami. Delivered to your door with insurance included.

### Private Jet Charter
Light jets, midsize, heavy and ultra-long range aircraft. Gulfstream G650, Global 7500, Challenger 350, Falcon 7X. Empty leg deals worldwide.

### Yacht Charter
Luxury yacht charters in Miami, the French Riviera, Ibiza, and Monaco. From 30ft day boats to 100ft+ superyachts with full crew and catering.

### Wellness & Spa
Premium spa bookings at Four Seasons, Dior Spa, Le Bristol. Personal training, facials, wellness retreats in Miami and Paris.

## Exclusive Events

- Monaco Grand Prix 2026 VIP Hospitality — June 5-7, Monte Carlo. Private lounge, Swimming Pool chicane view, helicopter transfers. Limited to 12 spots.
- Miami Grand Prix 2026 VIP — May 1-3, Miami Gardens. Turn 1 suite, paddock access, after-parties at LIV and E11even.
- Ibiza Opening 2026 — VIP season pass. Hï Ibiza, Ushuaïa, Pacha, Amnesia.
- Roland Garros 2026 — Private box seats, Philippe Chatrier, Michelin dining.
- Royal Ascot 2026 — Royal Enclosure, private box for 12, helicopter from London.

## Membership Tiers

- Gold ($9.99/month): Full app access, AI concierge, restaurant bookings, venue catalog
- Platinum ($99/month): Skip the line, VIP treatment, strategic table placement, dedicated concierge
- Centurion (Invite only): Dedicated personal agent, 24/7 WhatsApp, worldwide VIP, impossible reservations

## Cities

- Miami: South Beach, Brickell, Wynwood, Design District, Miami Beach
- Paris: 8th Arrondissement, Saint-Germain, Marais, Champs-Élysées
- Dubai: Downtown, DIFC, Palm Jumeirah, Marina, JBR
- London: Mayfair, Chelsea, Knightsbridge, Soho, Notting Hill
